scripts.allure:open: OZONE_PLATFORM=x11 WAYLAND_DISPLAY= BROWSER='bash scripts/open-maximized.sh' node node_modules/allure-commandline/bin/allure open allure-report 2>&1 | sed '/Wayland Proxy/d;/WaylandProxy::SetupWaylandDisplays/d;/Failed to open Wayland display/d'
scripts.allure:serve: OZONE_PLATFORM=x11 WAYLAND_DISPLAY= BROWSER='bash scripts/open-maximized.sh' node node_modules/allure-commandline/bin/allure serve allure-results 2>&1 | sed '/Wayland Proxy/d;/WaylandProxy::SetupWaylandDisplays/d;/Failed to open Wayland display/d'
scripts.docker:test:all:video: echo '=== [1/2] Running Playwright (headless + video) ===' && yarn docker:test:pw:video && echo '=== [2/2] Running Cucumber (headless + video | PT-BR + ENG) ===' && docker compose -f container/docker-compose.yml run --rm -e CUCUMBER_VIDEO=1 cucumber sh -lc 'yarn test:cucumber:workers:headless:video:all'
scripts.docker:test:api:video: docker compose -f container/docker-compose.yml run --rm api sh -lc 'yarn test:api'
scripts.docker:test:cucumber:video:eng: docker compose -f container/docker-compose.yml run --rm -e CUCUMBER_VIDEO=1 -e FEATURE_LOCALE=eng cucumber sh -lc 'yarn test:cucumber:headless:video'
scripts.docker:test:cucumber:video:pt-br: docker compose -f container/docker-compose.yml run --rm -e CUCUMBER_VIDEO=1 -e FEATURE_LOCALE=pt-br cucumber sh -lc 'yarn test:cucumber:headless:video'
scripts.docker:test:pw:video: docker compose -f container/docker-compose.yml run --rm -e PW_VIDEO_MODE=on playwright sh -lc 'yarn test:pw:headless:video'
scripts.test:all:headless:video:prompt: echo '=== [1/2] Running Playwright (headless + video) ===' && yarn test:pw:headless:video && echo '=== [2/2] Running Cucumber (headless + video + verbose prompt) ===' && yarn test:cucumber:no-workers:headless:video
scripts.test:all:video:prompt: echo '=== [1/2] Running Playwright (headed + video) ===' && yarn test:pw:headed:video && echo '=== [2/2] Running Cucumber (headed + video + verbose prompt) ===' && yarn test:cucumber:no-workers:headed:video
scripts.test:cucumber:workers:headless:video:all: FEATURE_LOCALE=pt-br yarn test:cucumber:workers:headless:video && FEATURE_LOCALE=eng yarn test:cucumber:workers:headless:video
